# BP-93 negative variant: the closure handles the returned error
lang: go
file: BP-93-variant-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"
)

func run(parent context.Context) error {
	g, ctx := errgroup.WithContext(parent)
	_ = ctx
	g.Go(func() error {
		if _, err := doWork(); err != nil {
			return fmt.Errorf("work: %w", err)
		}
		return nil
	})
	return g.Wait()
}

func doWork() (int, error) { return 0, nil }
